title: mimulus caespitosus var. implexus
intro: Mimulus caespitosus var. implexus, also known as sticky monkey flower, is a perennial plant species within the family Phrymaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Mimulus caespitosus var. implexus include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and aiding in the treatment of minor cuts and scrapes. Mimulus caespitosus var. implexus can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures for topical and internal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
